overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a bustling medieval market town. The character moves from a performance platform area through open market stalls, along a scenic waterfront canal with ships, and finally through a stone archway. The scene features timber-framed architecture, canvas market tents, and numerous NPC villagers going about their daily activities under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: market square with wooden performance platform

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a wooden platform where performers are gathered, passing by a man in green clothing

notable_agents.action: group of women in red and white ceremonial dresses standing on a wooden platform

entered.detail: tall timber-framed structure with external wooden staircase
raised wooden deck with stairs where performers in ceremonial dress are gathered
traditional medieval half-timbered buildings with dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval market square with dirt ground, approaching a wooden platform where women in ceremonial dresses are gathered. The area is surrounded by traditional timber-framed buildings under partial tree cover.

events.description: moves from the performance platform area into the dense market stall zone with canvas roofs

agents.ego_description: navigating through the bustling market, weaving between stalls and shoppers

entered.detail: market tents with beige canvas roofs covering wooden tables and goods
wooden wheeled carts used for transporting market goods
stacked wooden barrels beside market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the market district, surrounded by canvas-covered stalls, wooden carts, and barrels. Villagers browse goods and walk along the cobblestone paths between timber-framed buildings.

events.description: exits the enclosed market and emerges onto the open waterfront promenade with canal views
turns along the canal path revealing sailing ships and wooden loading cranes

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the canal and docked ships

notable_agents.action: elderly man with white hair sitting on the wooden dock railing

entered.detail: calm waterway running through the town with reflections of buildings
wooden fence railing along the edge of the canal walkway
tall ships with white sails docked in the harbor
large wooden loading crane structure for moving cargo
stone bridge crossing the canal in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto a scenic waterfront promenade featuring a canal with sailing ships, wooden dock railings, and loading cranes. The open sky creates a bright atmosphere as the character walks along the water past an elderly seated villager.

events.description: enters the shadowed stone archway leading to another district of the town

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the stone archway into the darker passage beyond

entered.detail: large stone arch tunnel with wooden roof structure connecting two parts of the town
simple wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the waterfront and approaches a large stone archway, passing wooden fences and returning to denser urban architecture. The scene transitions into the shadowed archway passage, marking the entrance to a different district of the medieval town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling medieval market town that transitions from a crowded square to a bright waterfront and finally into a shadowed stone passage. It begins with Geralt walking across a dirt square toward a wooden platform where women in ceremonial dresses gather beneath the shade of timber-framed buildings. As he moves deeper into the district, the open square shifts into a dense network of cobblestone paths lined with canvas-covered stalls, wooden carts, and browsing villagers. The scene then opens onto a scenic waterfront promenade, where the atmosphere brightens under an open sky as the camera follows the character past sailing ships, loading cranes, and a seated elderly villager. Finally, the path turns away from the water and passes wooden fences before the camera enters a large stone archway, transitioning from the sunny docks into the shadowed entrance of a new urban district.
